channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo’s ‘Drop Dead’ Debuts at No. 1 on U.K. Charts
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to Trending on Billboard, your weekly rundown of the latest hits and chart-toppers. I'm your host, [Name], and we've got some exciting news to share with you today.
[Music transitions]
Host: "Olivia Rodrigo is taking over the U.K. charts once again, with her new single 'Drop Dead' debuting at number one. This marks her fourth U.K. number one single, following in the footsteps of 'drivers license', 'good 4 u', and 'vampire'. And if you're wondering what's next for Olivia, her upcoming third album 'You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love' is set to drop on June 12.
[Short music clip of "Drop Dead"]
Host: "But Olivia isn't the only one making waves in the charts. Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' has been dethroned after five weeks at the top spot, and now sits at number two. Meanwhile, Justin Bieber is seeing a resurgence in the U.K. charts, with hits like 'Beauty and a Beat' and 'Daises' climbing the ranks.
[Short music clip of "Beauty and a Beat"]
Host: "And on the album side, Skindred has taken the top spot with their ninth studio album 'You Got This', just edging out Jessie Ware's 'Superbloom'. Zayn's 'Konnakol' rounds out the top four. That's all for this week's Trending on Billboard. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you next time!"
[Outro music plays]
